zh.Askrigg, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾阿斯可利格
zh.Nappa by Askrigg, Yorkshire, England: 英國越可爾納帕 白 阿斯可利格
zh.lifeSummary: Gelsone Gibson是Gibson IREBY的女兒，於1395年出生在英國藍卡爾易比。她於1414年與James Metcalfe在英國越可爾阿斯可利格結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1439年在英國越可爾阿斯可利格享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gelsone Gibson是Gibson IREBY的女儿，于1395年出生在英国藍卡爾易比。她于1414年与James Metcalfe在英国越可爾阿斯可利格结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1439年在英国越可爾阿斯可利格享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gibson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Older Scots personal name Gibb (a pet form of Gilbert) + son, hence ‘son of Gibb’. The name is very common in Ireland, having arrived in that country in the 17th century. It is also occasionally adopted for Ó Gibealláin, see Giblin .

variants.name: Gibb
meanings: English: from the personal name Gibb, a pet form of Gilbert (compare Gibbs ). This surname is also frequent in Scotland.

nameMeanings.name: Gelsone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: relationship name from the Middle English personal name Gelle or Gell ( see Gell ). See also Gilson .

variants.name: Gilson
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, in origin a patronymic from   Will .  Use as a given name in the United States was inspired by President (Thomas) Woodrow Wilson (  1856–1924 );  compare the similar adoption as a given name of  Woodrow .

variants.name: Gell
meanings: Medieval short form of Eleanor , Ellen , and Helen . For the initial N-, compare Nan and Ned . It was the name by which Charles II's mistress Eleanor Gwyn ( 1650–87 ) was universally known to her contemporaries, and at about that time it also became established as an independent name.

en.lifeSummary: Gelsone Gibson was born in 1395, in Ireby, Lancashire, England as the daughter of Gibson IREBY. She married James Metcalfe in 1414, in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1439, in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Gelsone Gibson est née en 1395, à Ireby, Lancashire, Angleterre, fille de Gibson IREBY. Elle a épousé James Metcalfe en 1414, à Askrigg, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1439, à Askrigg, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Gelsone Gibson wurde 1395 in Ireby, Lancashire, England, als Tochter von Gibson IREBY geboren. Sie hat 1414 in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England James Metcalfe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1439 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Askrigg, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Gelsone Gibson è nata il nel 1395 nel Ireby, Lancashire, England come figlia di Gibson IREBY. Lei sposato James Metcalfe nel 1414, nel Askrigg, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1439, nel Askrigg, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gelsone Gibsonは1395年にイギリスランカシュアイアアイレビーでGibson IREBYの娘として生まれた。1414年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアスクリググでJames Metcalfeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1439年にイギリスヨークシュアイアアスクリググで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gelsone Gibson(은)는 1395년 영국 랭카실르 이레비에서 Gibson IREBY의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1414년 영국 요르크실르 아스크리그에서 James Metcalfe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1439년 영국 요르크실르 아스크리그에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gelsone Gibson nasceu em 1395, em Ireby, Lancashire, Inglaterra filha de Gibson IREBY. Ela casou-se com James Metcalfe em 1414, em Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1439, em Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Gelsone Gibson родилась в 1395 г. в местности иреби, ланкашир, Англия. Её отца звали Gibson IREBY. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени James Metcalfe в 1414 г. в местности аскриг, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1439 г. в местности аскриг, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Gelsone Gibson nació en 1395, en Ireby, Lancashire, Inglaterra como hija de Gibson IREBY. Se casó con James Metcalfe en 1414, en Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1439, en Askrigg, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 44 años.
